results.title: China: Man swims through flood water for 3 hours to check on elderly parents
results.description: A man, identified as 30-year-old Xie swam for 3 hours to reach his parents in the village. He took the help of a tyre and was accompanied by a friend in the arduous journey. While Xie and his 2 siblings live in the town, his parents stay in a village in Qinzhou, which is around 10 kilometres away.

results.title: Massive explosion in illegal firecracker factory in Ahmedabad, painful death of 8 people, many seriously burnt.
results.description: Eight people died, while many suffered serious burns in a massive explosion and fire in an illegally operated firecracker factory in Ramol area of ​​Ahmedabad. The license of the factory had already been cancelled. Police have registered the case and started investigation and relief operations are underway.

results.title: Jennifer Winget's husband William Ishmael; know about his career, education and life away from the spotlight
results.description: TV actor Jennifer Winget has spent over two decades in the entertainment industry, building one of the most successful careers in Indian television. She won millions of hearts with shows such as Dill Mill Gayye, Saraswatichandra, Beyhadh and Bepannaah. The actress has now tied the knot with her partner, William Ishmael.
